video_info.shortDescription: The world's premier clay-court championship returns to Paris, gathering the global elite to battle on the iconic red dirt where victory belongs to the most tenacious. As players push their endurance and tactical artistry to the absolute limit, they compete for ultimate glory and a historic place in Grand Slam history. video_info.title: UEFA International Friendlies
video_info.shortDescription: Switzerland face Jordan in an engaging international friendly as both teams continue to prepare for upcoming competitions and assess their squad combinations. Switzerland will aim to use their structured style and attacking depth to control the contest, while Jordan look to deliver a disciplined performance and challenge their opponents with quick transitions and organized defending. Catch all the action from the International Friendlies, LIVE on Sony LIV.
